Date filter issued_on >= 2026-01-01 includes INV-0008 (220) and INV-0011 (160); excludes INV-0007 (2025-12-21, 110). Arithmetic: 220 + 160 = 380. Ready to return numeric result.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context) and read nested finance AGENTS before invoice analysis. Used invoice line-item values (not invoice totals) per service-line rule.
function.outcome_justification: Matching line item 'staff follow-up support' appears in three invoices; only two are dated from January 2026 onward. Summed line_eur 220 (2026-01-19) + 160 (2026-03-29) = 380.
